李遥穿越到了虚拟技术非常发达的世界，却发现这个世界的游戏行业相对来说十分的落后。
身为土木专业的牛马，李遥毅然辞职。
为了让这个世界的玩家体验到电子游戏带来的魅力。
李遥决定成为一名游戏制作人，并率先给玩家们扔出了重磅，开发出了《生化危机》。
当世界上所有玩家都齐齐高呼《生化危机》为史上最恐怖的游戏的时候。
李遥又面无表情的掏出了《最后的我们》《死亡空间》、《黑暗之魂》、《老头环》、《战神》.........
李遥非常的无奈：其实我只是随手设计一下游戏而已，怎么就成了全球游戏之神了？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d1fa290c33122e4e17c614dedfb8987c","author":"不锈钢路由器","author_id":"","book_id":"7135074532603202598","book_name":"开局制作生化危机，全球玩家吓尿","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1402人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7135281473833796111","read_count":"1402","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"292655"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"133","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,直播,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d07b21c69cf7cdc446c90a677fabad5b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180375&x-signature=ILr2i2EFmFaJnXGnMK99tszOKLw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2629651493819725","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.28075e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201646156261245B9510725E82CD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwar
